## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md) format
- [ ] I added/updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if needed
